latest.title: Praying mantis doesn't pray it hunts
latest.script_key: this thing isn t praying that folded pose lets it lunge like a coiled spring its head swivels 180 degrees to lock onto prey before it strikes that s why it looks so still it s zeroing in not praying did you ever think it was actually praying

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
